title: Welcome to argue here, not before NCLAT: Supreme Court to retired technical member
description: The Supreme Court on Wednesday saw a rare in-person appearance when Vijai Pratap Singh, a former technical member of the National Company Law Appellate Tribunal (NCLAT), argued his own writ petition challenging the rule that prohibits former members of the tribunal from practising before it.A Bench of Chief Justice Surya Kant and Justices Joymalya Bagchi and Vipul Pancholi heard the petition.CJI Surya Kant , Justice Joymalya Bagchi and Justice Vipul M Pancholi Singh, who served as a technical me
